context: √  tracer defect may be visible on only one image projection √  15-20% regional tracer intensity variation is normal Left Ventricular Anatomy and Projections √  displays anterolateral wall, apex, inferior wall √  decreased activity at apex of LV ← thinning in 50% √  displays inferior + anterior wall √  displays interventricular septum, posterior wall, inferior wall √  best projection to separate right + left ventricles √  best projection to evaluate septal + posterior LV wall motion √  displays anterior + inferior ventricular wall √  useful during 1st-pass studies with temporal separation of v
